image.alt: A goat with a seeming smile, tilting its head slightly.
Low waves are lapping towards the shore, a small sailboat is visible on the horizon.

caption: Norderney, Germany.

image.alt: A stag with large antlers.

caption: Wildlife park in Dünnwald, Cologne.

image.alt: A statue in a small lake in a park during summertime.

caption: The Königin Astridpark in Bruges, Belgium.

image.alt: A cherry blossom tree in full bloom, a cyclist driving beneath it, and a couple on a bench is enjoying the view.

caption: Cherry blossoms during springtime.

image.alt: A statue of a woman, partially covered in snow, lit from behind by a street lantern under heavy snowfall.

caption: Cologne under snow.

image.alt: A blue firework exploding against the outline of a tree, trailing blue smoke.

caption: New year's eve in Cologne.

image.alt: A small red fungus with white spots nestled amidst leaves and grass.
Tree trunks submerged below turquoise water.

caption: The Hintersee in Bavaria, Germany.

link.text: See more photos of the Zauberwald

image.alt: A sheep showing a crooked smile to the camera.

caption: The sheep are back!

image.alt: A lifeboat with the name Isle of Arran printed on the side.

caption: From a trip to the Isle of Arran and Glen Rosa.

image.alt: View of Loch Lomond in Scotland with a water bus heading towards a tiny island.

caption: We went on a hike from Balloch to Helensburgh.

image.alt: A Paddington bear plush sitting in a sea of flowers, with a tiny Union Jack in its breast pocket.

caption: The floral tribute at Green Park.

link.text: More photos of the floral tribute

image.alt: Close-up of a gray squirrel sitting on a dead branch and tilting its head.

caption: I found some squirrels in Kelvingrove Park in Glasgow!

image.alt: A brown squirrel looking directly at the camera.
A close-up picture of some froth on a tiny wave in black-and-white.
A frog sitting in mud looking directly at the camera.
A red spotted butterfly sitting on a rock.
Branch of a ginkgo tree with green leaves set against a blue sky.
A tree standing in a field with radial motion blur around it.
A young sheep standing in tall grass, looking attentively at the camera.

caption: Sheep again this year!

link.text: View more sheep from this shoot

image.alt: A macro shot of a wasp clinging vertically to a board.

caption: It took me a while to get close enough to a wasp without it flying away.

image.alt: A macro shot of a bee.

caption: With macro photography, subjects may just come flying in through your kitchen window.

image.alt: A bumblebee clinging to the underside of some blossoms on a branch.
A river bank with some black skyscraper silhouettes on the far side set against a sunset.

caption: Shot on a Pixel 5

image.alt: A shopping cart half submerged in a pond.
A black-and-white photo of a cut-down Christmas tree laying on the ground covered in snow.

link.text: View more photos from this snowy night

image.alt: Multiple layers of fungi growing on a log.

caption: Some interesting fungi growing on a log.

image.alt: A close-up of a butterfly sitting on a purple flower, showing its orange wings with markings that are reminiscent of a pair of eyes.

caption: It's rare for a butterfly to sit still long enough for me to take a close-up.

image.alt: Silhouette of a woman's head against an orange sunset.
A young sheep on a green field running away from the camera and out of the frame.

caption: Young sheep don't want to stand still for you to take their picture!

image.alt: A duck swimming across a pond, cleanly reflected on the water’s surface

caption: During lockdown you learn to appreciate your immediate environment again. This duck lives in the small park next door.

image.alt: A wide shot of the Louvre's pyramid entrance, shot from the upper floors so you can see the square surrounding it.

caption: I took this from inside the Louvre, looking over the pyramid entrance on a rainy day. The smudges in the lower left are rain drops on the window.

link.text: View some of my favourite photos

image.alt: A black-and-white photo of a marble statue of a woman holding a pigeon

caption: A statue in a little alcove in the Louvre.

image.alt: Close-up of a blue damselfly on a green leaf.

caption: A blue damselfly that posed for me on my way to a shooting.

image.alt: Black-and-white close-up of a sheep's right eye and tagged ear.

caption: I went to visit the sheep again!

image.alt: A close-up of a young nutria (coypu) with brown fur.

caption: We spotted a family of nutria (coypu) by a forest pond.

image.alt: A black-and-white photo of frothy waves approaching the shore, with a lighthouse shining in the background.
A path next to a dark field leading towards a bright yellow streetlight at dusk.

caption: The light at the end of the road.

image.alt: A sunny path across a hill flanked by power poles.

caption: Somewhere in Edinburgh …

link.text: View all photos I took in Edinburgh

image.alt: A black-and-white photo of tree tops fading behind mist towards the background.

caption: Shot out of a moving train traveling from Edinburgh to Inverness.

image.alt: A black-and-white photo of a raven before a white background looking over its shoulder.

caption: We spotted this raven in Edinburgh, and it waited patiently for me to get the best shot I could.

link.text: View more of my animal photography

image.alt: A deer licking its lips with closed eyes after eating a tasty apple

caption: This deer really enjoyed the apple we gave it!

link.text: View all photos from the wildlife park

image.alt: A young sheep looking directly into the camera. It appears to be smiling.

caption: The sheep down by the river Rhine are always happy to pose for you!

link.text: View all sheep pictures I took that day

image.alt: A girl holding a semi-translucent scarf fluttering in the wind, backlit by bright sunlight.

caption: Taken during a spontaneous shoot on a sunny day with some scarves.

image.alt: A small boat on a canal in front of some colorful varicoloured house fronts.

caption: A canal in Amsterdam.

image.alt: Black-and-white close-up of a woman's face looking at a light source. Only the right eye is lit up, the rest fades into the shadows.

caption: Taken during a black-and-white portrait session with Christina.

image.alt: A blonde woman standing in front of a tree with yellow leaves in autumn.

caption: Autumn colors.

image.alt: Long exposure of purple fireworks over the Rhine with the Cologne Cathedral.

caption: From the yearly fireworks event ‘Kölner Lichter’.
